raw_consumer_statement:
Hello, I requested a new card but never received it. Subsequently, I noticed unauthorized charges on my account. I called and reported the fraudulent activity, explaining that I had not received the card in the mail. After an investigation, the charges were denied. 

Despite continuing to seek a resolution, I was informed that I needed to submit a police report. I had already done this and provided the case number, but months passed, and the fraud claim was still denied. I asked why, pointing out that I could not have made the purchases without having the card in my possession. I was again instructed to send the police report, which I did. However, even after two more months, the fraud claim was still denied. 

I refuse to pay for charges I did not authorize. I am seeking assistance with this matter. 

Best regards,
